name: ggajos-tasks-eye
description: A unified native Obsidian task view for Tasks-driven vaults.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:acceptance && npm run docs
scripts.test:acceptance: npm run build && npm run typecheck:acceptance && wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts
scripts.docs: npm run typecheck && node acceptance/scripts/publish-doc-screenshots.mjs && tsx scripts/build-docs.ts && astro build --config docs-src/astro.config.mjs
scripts.docs:serve: npm run docs && astro preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 --config docs-src/astro.config.mjs
